metadata.description: VoiceMode - Voice conversations for Claude Code

plugins.name: voicemode
plugins.description: Voice conversations with Claude Code using local speech-to-text and text-to-speech. Includes support for remote agents via mobile, web and CLI.

plugins.name: show-me
plugins.description: Visual context sharing between AI and users - display files/URLs/commands with 'show', observe screen context with 'look'
